extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI attacked on final categorized climb approximately 5km from finish, caught breakaway rider CATALDO, and won to take overall lead
tactical_patterns: CATALDO collected points on all three categorized climbs despite breakaway being doomed, maximizing classification opportunities before inevitable catch
Team Sky positioned THOMAS at front with KWIATKOWSKI in the wheels, then reversed roles for KWIATKOWSKI's decisive attack
LUTSENKO's late bridge attempt from Astana failed because Sky controlled tempo perfectly preventing gap closure from scattered chasers

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: attacked from protected position in wheels to win and take race lead, showing Sky tactical flexibility
rider_signals.CATALDO Dario: positive: broke away three times despite mechanical issues, systematically collected mountain points on all three climbs
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: worked at front to position KWIATKOWSKI, reversed team hierarchy suggests secondary GC role at this race
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: negative: late bridge attempt failed, indicating lack of firepower or poor positioning when KWIATKOWSKI attacked
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: commentary noted LUTSENKO bridging would be trouble for him, suggesting he was already distanced or isolated
